case_title: EMMETT MURPHY VS. SAN FRANCISCO PARKS ALLIANCE

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MURPHY, EMMETT AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO PARKS ALLIANCE

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED AT THE REQUEST OF BOTH PARTIES. PRIOR TO THE CALLING OF THE CASE PARTIES REACHED AN AGREEMENT. PLAINTIFF EMMETT MURPHY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO PARKS ALLIANCE IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY AMANDA MONTEX, DIRECTOR OF PROGRAMS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY MURPHY, EMMETT AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO PARKS ALLIANCE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-10-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-29-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO PARKS ALLIANCE
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 12/8/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL. CASE SETTLED (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO PARKS ALLIANCE
